pymetis
  • API Reference
  • METIS Mixins
  • View page source

METIS Mixins

Mixins that inject tag parameters into DataItem and RecipeImpl classes via Python’s multiple inheritance mechanism. See The Tag / Parametrization System for a conceptual explanation.

This file is part of the METIS Pipeline. Copyright (C) 2024 European Southern Observatory
